articles.author: Charean Williams
articles.title: Rams-49ers officially will kick off in Australia on Thursday, Sept. 10, at 8:35 p.m. ET - NBC Sports
articles.description: The NFL announced the date and time for Australia’s first regular-season game.
articles.content:
The NFL announced the date and time for Australias first regular-season game.
The Rams will face the 49ers on Friday, Sept. 11, at approximately 10:35 a.m. AEST at the iconic Melbourne Cricket Groun… [+1726 chars]
